raw_consumer_statement: My XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX was fraudulently charged on XX/XX/year> in an amount totaling {$530.00}. The merchant for this charge was to XXXX XXXX XXXX. When I called to dispute the charge Barclays incorrectly submitted the dispute as Services Not Rendered/Received versus a fraud charge. The Barclays reference for this is XXXX ID XXXX. The merchant decline the dispute, Barclays required payment, and I am unable to receive customer service assistance from Barclays to resubmit the dispute as fraudulent. I have escalated within Barclays credit card customer service team multiple times and have been promised a call by a customer service XXXX but I have never received a call back. When I call to inquire about the escalation resolution I am told a XXXX called but I didn't answer. Again, I have never received a return call from Barclays.
